# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

<div class="comments-section">
    @forelse($comments as $comment)
        <div class="comment mb-4 p-4 border rounded">
            <div class="comment-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-2">
                <div class="comment-author">
                    <strong>{{ $comment->user->name }}</strong>
                    <span class="text-muted ms-2">{{ $comment->created_at->diffForHumans() }}</span>
                </div>
                @auth
                    @if(auth()->id() === $comment->user_id || auth()->user()->is_admin)
                        <div class="comment-actions">
                            <a href="{{ route('comments.edit', $comment->id) }}" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">Edit</a>
                            <form action="{{ route('comments.destroy', $comment->id) }}" method="POST" class="d-inline">
                                @csrf
                                @method('DELETE')
                                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-danger" onclick="return confirm('Are you sure?')">Delete</button>
                            </form>
                        </div>
                    @endif
                @endauth
            </div>
            <div class="comment-content">
                {!! Illuminate\Support\Str::limit(strip_tags($comment->content), 500) !!}
            </div>
        </div>
    @empty
        <p class="text-muted">No comments yet. Be the first to comment!</p>
    @endforelse

    <div class="pagination-wrapper mt-4">
        {{ $comments->links() }}
    </div>
</div>
